about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Premium Home Fragrances by By Velcheva
about.content:
NicheHome.ch presents a carefully curated selection of home fragrances developed for discerning residential and hospitality concepts. Each creation arises from a passion for exceptional accords and long-lasting performance.

Our boutique serves interior designers, boutiques and private clients throughout Switzerland with flexible terms, customized consulting and ready-to-use collections.

By Velcheva combines elegance and warmth in a sophisticated format. Perfect for those who want premium fragrances that transform any space into a sensory experience.

aromaMarketing.title: Aroma Marketing
aromaMarketing.subtitle: Professional scenting solutions for your business
aromaMarketing.content:
Transform your business environment with our professional aroma marketing services. We offer customized scenting solutions for hotels, retail stores, offices, and other commercial spaces.

Our team works with you to create a unique olfactory identity that enhances customer experience and brand recognition.
aromaMarketing.formSuccess: Thank you for your inquiry. Our team will contact you within 24 hours.

footer.newsletterText: Exclusive launches, placement tips and invitations to scent sessions.
footer.copyright: © NicheHome.ch – Official Swiss Representative of By Velcheva

diffuser_classic.name: Aroma Diffuser
diffuser_classic.desc:
Elegant aroma diffuser with natural rattan sticks that continuously releases your chosen fragrance throughout the space.

Perfect for any room in your home or office, this diffuser provides long-lasting, subtle fragrance without the need for electricity or flames.

Available in three sizes to suit different room dimensions:
• 125ml - ideal for small spaces (bathrooms, closets) - lasts approximately 4-6 weeks
• 250ml - perfect for medium rooms (bedrooms, offices) - lasts approximately 8-10 weeks
• 500ml - best for large spaces (living rooms, lobbies) - lasts approximately 16-20 weeks

Simply place the rattan sticks into the bottle and the fragrance will gradually diffuse into your space. Turn the sticks weekly for optimal fragrance distribution.

candle_classic.name: Scented Candle
candle_classic.desc:
Premium scented candle crafted with high-quality vegetable waxes (coconut and soy) for clean, even burning and excellent fragrance diffusion.

Elegant minimalist design complements any interior style from modern to classic. Each candle fills your space with rich, long-lasting fragrance within minutes of lighting.

Available in two sizes:
• 160ml - burn time approximately 25-30 hours, perfect for bedrooms and small spaces
• 500ml - burn time approximately 70-80 hours, ideal for living rooms and large areas

Our candles make a wonderful gift and serve as both a fragrance source and stylish home décor accent.

home_spray.name: Interior Spray
home_spray.desc:
Instant home fragrance spray that quickly refreshes any space with a fine mist of your favorite scent.

Perfect for quick touch-ups before guests arrive or whenever you want an immediate burst of fragrance. Use in living rooms, bathrooms, entryways, or any space that needs instant freshening.

Available in two convenient sizes:
• 10ml - travel-sized, perfect for your purse or car
• 50ml - regular size for home use

Simply spray 2-3 times into the air and enjoy the immediate transformation of your space. Safe for use around fabrics and furniture when sprayed into the air.

car_clip.name: Car Perfume
car_clip.desc:
Stylish car air freshener that clips easily onto your car's air vent, delivering continuous fragrance while you drive.

Compact and elegant design blends seamlessly with your car's interior. The fragrance intensity adjusts naturally with your air conditioning or heating - stronger airflow means more fragrance.

Each car perfume lasts approximately 4-6 weeks depending on usage and climate conditions. Simply clip it onto any air vent and enjoy your favorite scent during every journey.

Perfect for keeping your car fresh and welcoming, or as a thoughtful gift for car owners.

textile_spray.name: Textile Perfume Spray
textile_spray.desc: A gentle scented spray for curtains, carpets, furniture and bedding.

limited_new_york.name: New York Limited Edition
limited_new_york.desc:
A vibrant party, sharp cocktails, and the spicy freshness of the city of lights, skyscrapers, and unexpected encounters…

Your night will be remembered by the scent of dark wood, smoky amber, and bold citrus notes.

Designed in an elegant minimalist style, this candle suits both modern and classic interiors. It brings the atmosphere of a big city evening and serves as a chic decorative accent for your home.

Crafted using only high-quality vegetable waxes — coconut and soy — it offers excellent scent diffusion. Within minutes of lighting, your space is filled with a deep, rich, and long-lasting fragrance trail.

This limited edition BY VELCHEVA candle is both a stylish home décor piece and a wonderful gift for friends, loved ones, or colleagues.

Features:
Volume: 270 ml
Burn time: approx. 40 hours
Premium vegetable waxes: coconut and soy
Fragrance: woody-amber with citrus notes
Design: elegant and minimalist

limited_abu_dhabi.name: Abu Dhabi Limited Edition
limited_abu_dhabi.desc:
Embracing warm nights under a starlit sky and soft sand beneath your feet…

Rich spicy notes blend with gentle lavender and a lush bouquet of florals — this is the scent of your unforgettable weekend in Abu Dhabi.

Crafted in an elegant, minimalist design, this candle will complement any interior — from modern to classic. More than just a source of fragrance, it's a refined decorative accent for your home.

We use only high-quality plant-based waxes — coconut and soy — known for their excellent ability to retain and release fragrance. Within minutes of lighting, your space is filled with a rich, long-lasting, and sophisticated perfumed trail.

A scented candle from the BY VELCHEVA limited collection is a stylish decor element for your home and also a perfect gift for friends, loved ones, or colleagues.

Details:
Volume: 270 ml
Burn time: approx. 40 hours
Premium plant-based waxes: coconut and soy
Fragrance: oriental-floral with notes of lavender and spices
Design: elegant and minimalist

limited_palermo.name: Palermo Limited Edition
limited_palermo.desc:
Gentle rays of sunshine, a refreshing coastal breeze, and an abundance of citrus fruits you can pick by hand…

Radiant notes of mandarin and bitter orange blend with the soft scent of peonies and vibrant basil — this is how you'll remember a walk through Palermo.

The candle is designed in a refined minimalist style and will beautifully complement both modern and classic interiors. Its fragrance fills the space with lightness, joy, and a sunny mood.

We use only high-quality vegetable waxes — coconut and soy. They ensure even burning and excellent fragrance diffusion, which begins to unfold within the first minutes of lighting.

The limited-edition BY VELCHEVA scented candle is a stylish piece of home décor and a perfect gift for friends, loved ones, or colleagues.

Specifications:
Volume: 270 ml
Burn time: approximately 40 hours
Premium vegetable waxes: coconut and soy
Fragrance: citrus-floral with notes of peony and basil
Design: elegant and minimalist

aroma_sashe.name: Aroma Sashé
aroma_sashe.desc:
Our home perfumes come in the form of solid air fresheners. We have created them concise and aesthetic.

Therefore, this product will be a very pleasant addition to your home. The fragrance of the solid air freshener is more delicate than that of a regular home perfume.

This type of product will not declare itself as loudly. But it can subtly and effectively highlight individual details.

In other words, you have the opportunity to selectively scent any object by simply placing or hanging an aromatic air freshener there. For example, you can place it in a wardrobe with clothes. Every time you open the doors of your wardrobe, you will feel a light trace of your favorite fragrance.

There is a rule: the smaller the distribution area, the longer the fragrance lasts.

christ_toy.name: Flavored Christmas tree toys BY VELCHEVA
christ_toy.desc:
The most festive and magical novelty from BY VELCHEVA.
Stylish minimalist ornaments will make a wonderful decoration for your Christmas tree.
Made from white plaster, these ornaments will fit into any interior. A soft and subtle fragrant trail will envelop your tree and give you a festive mood.
Fragrant ornaments are the best solution for owners of artificial trees. Moreover, they can also be used as a standalone decorative element.
The ornaments are available in holiday, Christmas scents.

Fill your space with coziness and a magical atmosphere with BY VELCHEVA!

refill_125.name: Refill for Aroma Diffusers and car aroma device (125ml)
refill_125.desc:
A bottle of additional aromatic liquid.
A bottle with a fragrance composition included in the aroma diffuser set.
Also available for separate purchase – when the aromatic liquid from your set runs out, you won’t need to buy a new aroma diffuser; simply purchase an additional refill.
Volume: 125 ml.

sticks.name: Incense sticks
sticks.desc:
Incense sticks are aromatic sticks used to create a pleasant atmosphere and freshen the air. Lovingly made in India, they have a special Eastern spirit.
Each set of incense sticks contains half red guggul sticks and half white louban sticks.
The red sticks made from guggul have an intense and passionate aroma that helps create an energetic and stimulating atmosphere.
The white sticks, made from louban, emit a delicate and calming fragrance, promoting relax and meditation.
Express your individuality and choose the number of incense sticks that suit you best to create a unique atmosphere in your home.
Immerse yourself in the magic of incense sticks and enjoy their amazing aromas!

car_s8007.name: Aroma device for the car
car_s8007.desc:
• Coverage area up to 10 sq m
• Works and charges via USB 2.0 cable - charge lasts up to 4 hours
• Manual control and customization
• Can be placed in a cup holder

The compact car aroma machine is the best solution for scenting your car.
You can personally choose the interval and duration of aroma diffusion. As a result, the device operates only when you need it.
The aroma is diffused using dry mist technology, which helps eliminate unpleasant odors quickly and effectively.
Additionally, the scent fills the car's interior, creating the desired atmosphere and mood.
The device can be charged using the provided USB 2.0 cable. A single charge lasts for 4 hours of continuous operation.
Conveniently, you can place the aroma machine in a cup holder, as it takes up minimal space and operates silently.
This compact and user-friendly aroma machine will make an ideal gift for all car enthusiasts.

smart.name: Aroma Smart
smart.desc:
Aromasmart is the best solution for you.
The equipment is easy to transport and install - you can place the scent machine on a surface or mount it on a wall using the included bracket.
The device operates both from a power source and AA batteries, which are available in any store or supermarket. If using batteries, you'll need around 6 pieces for one month of usage.
Aromasmart is an ideal choice for small business spaces.
